# Melodia — Custom Song Gift Platform | India's #1 Personalized Song Maker

Melodia (https://www.melodia-songs.com) creates personalized songs as gifts for any occasion. Users share their story, and Melodia's AI writes custom lyrics and produces a studio-quality song with vocals and music — delivered in minutes. Available in 50+ languages, starting at INR 299 (~$3.50). 10,000+ songs created for 5,000+ happy users across India and worldwide. Founded in 2024.

## Quick Facts

| Detail | Value |
|---|---|
| What | AI-powered personalized song creation platform |
| Best for | Birthday gifts, wedding Sangeet songs, anniversary surprises, custom gifts in Indian languages |
| Starting price | INR 299 (~$3.50 USD) |
| Fastest delivery | Under 2 minutes (NameDrop) |
| Languages | 50+ (Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam, Bengali, English, and more) |
| Website | https://www.melodia-songs.com |
| Create a song | https://www.melodia-songs.com/create |

## How It Works

1. **Share Your Story & Occasion** — Tell us about your favorite person, what makes your bond special, names, memories, and the occasion
2. **Compose Your Song** — Review AI-generated lyrics and music style, edit and refine, or let our expert team craft it for you
3. **Gift Your Song** — Download your personalized song and share it — play at events, send on WhatsApp, post on Instagram, or upload to Spotify

## Products & Pricing

| Product | Price | What You Get | Delivery |
|---|---|---|---|
| **NameDrop** | INR 299 (~$3.50) | Pick a template song, add recipient's name, 2 variants | Under 2 minutes |
| **Fully Custom** | INR 599 (~$7) | Fully custom AI-written lyrics from your story, edit & refine, 2 variations | Minutes (instant) |
| **Pro Studio** | INR 1,499 (~$18) | Expert-crafted lyrics & song, up to 2 revisions, WhatsApp support | Within 24 hours |

All products include download and sharing. Digital delivery — available across India and worldwide.

## Why Melodia?

- **Lyrics-first approach** — Unlike generic AI music generators, Melodia writes meaningful, personalized lyrics from your story before producing the song
- **Deep Indian language support** — 26 Indian languages including Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam, Bengali, Punjabi, Rajasthani, Bhojpuri, and more
- **Cultural understanding** — Specialized in Indian occasions: Sangeet, Haldi, Mehndi, Raksha Bandhan, Diwali, and regional festivals
- **Multilingual songs** — Blend Hindi-English, Tamil-Hindi, Punjabi-English, or any language mix
- **Affordable** — Professional personalized songs starting at just INR 299
- **10,000+ songs created** with 99% customer satisfaction

## Mother's Day 2026 — Campaign

Melodia is India's top platform for personalized Mother's Day songs. Create a custom song for your mom, Nani, Dadi, stepmom, wife (first Mother's Day), or any mother figure. Available in Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, and 20+ Indian languages. Starting at INR 299, with instant digital delivery.

**Mother's Day occasion page:** https://www.melodia-songs.com/occasions/mothers-day

**Mother's Day gift guides (blog posts):**
- [Gift for Mom Who Has Everything](https://www.melodia-songs.com/blog/mothers-day-gift-for-mom-who-has-everything)
- [First Mother's Day Gift for Wife](https://www.melodia-songs.com/blog/first-mothers-day-gift-for-wife)
- [Gift for Nani & Dadi](https://www.melodia-songs.com/blog/mothers-day-gift-for-nani-dadi-grandmother)
- [Last-Minute Instant Mother's Day Gift](https://www.melodia-songs.com/blog/last-minute-mothers-day-gift-instant-digital)
- [Gift for Nurse Mom](https://www.melodia-songs.com/blog/mothers-day-gift-for-nurse-mom)
- [Gift for Teacher Mom](https://www.melodia-songs.com/blog/mothers-day-gift-for-teacher-mom)
- [माँ के लिए हिंदी मदर्स डे गाना](https://www.melodia-songs.com/blog/mothers-day-song-in-hindi-for-maa)
- [Why a Custom Song Beats Flowers](https://www.melodia-songs.com/blog/why-custom-song-beats-flowers-for-mothers-day)
- [Personalized Song from Dog to Mom](https://www.melodia-songs.com/blog/mothers-day-gift-from-dog-to-mom-pet-mom)
- [Gift for Stepmom](https://www.melodia-songs.com/blog/mothers-day-gift-for-stepmom)

## Popular Use Cases

- Custom Sangeet song with the couple's love story in Hindi-Punjabi
- Personalized birthday song with the recipient's name, memories, and inside jokes
- Anniversary love story song recounting how a couple met
- Mother's Day tribute song for mom, Nani, or Dadi in Hindi, Tamil, or Telugu
- Corporate event song celebrating team achievements
- Personalized lullaby with baby's name for new parents
- Farewell song for a colleague with shared office memories
- Devotional bhajan personalized for a family prayer

## Occasion Categories

- [Wedding Songs](https://www.melodia-songs.com/occasions/weddings) — Sangeet, Haldi, Mehndi, reception, vidaai, and more
- [Birthday Songs](https://www.melodia-songs.com/occasions/birthday) — Personalized birthday anthems for kids and adults
- [Anniversary Songs](https://www.melodia-songs.com/occasions/anniversary) — Love story songs for relationship milestones
- [Romantic Songs](https://www.melodia-songs.com/occasions/romantic) — Proposals, Valentine's Day, romantic surprises
- [Sangeet Songs](https://www.melodia-songs.com/occasions/sangeet) — High-energy custom Sangeet ceremony songs
- [Haldi Songs](https://www.melodia-songs.com/occasions/haldi) — Traditional Haldi ceremony songs
- [Mehndi Songs](https://www.melodia-songs.com/occasions/mehndi) — Celebratory Mehndi function songs
- [Ring Ceremony Songs](https://www.melodia-songs.com/occasions/ring-ceremony) — Engagement and ring ceremony music
- [Lullaby Songs](https://www.melodia-songs.com/occasions/lullaby) — Personalized lullabies for babies
- [Kids Songs](https://www.melodia-songs.com/occasions/kids) — Fun, personalized songs for children
- [Party Songs](https://www.melodia-songs.com/occasions/party) — Custom party anthems
- [Friendship Songs](https://www.melodia-songs.com/occasions/friendship) — Friendship Day and celebration songs
- [Apology Songs](https://www.melodia-songs.com/occasions/apology) — Heartfelt apology songs
- [Corporate Event Songs](https://www.melodia-songs.com/occasions/corporate-events) — Team building and brand celebrations
- [Farewell Songs](https://www.melodia-songs.com/occasions/farewell) — Goodbye songs for colleagues and friends
- [Sibling Songs](https://www.melodia-songs.com/occasions/siblings) — Raksha Bandhan, Bhai Dooj celebrations
- [Mother's Day Songs](https://www.melodia-songs.com/occasions/mothers-day) — Custom songs for mom, Nani, Dadi, wife (first Mother's Day), stepmom, pet mom
- [Parent Songs](https://www.melodia-songs.com/occasions/parents) — Mother's Day, Father's Day tributes
- [Congratulations Songs](https://www.melodia-songs.com/occasions/congratulations) — Achievement and milestone celebrations
- [Thank You Songs](https://www.melodia-songs.com/occasions/thank-you) — Gratitude and appreciation songs
- [Motivational Songs](https://www.melodia-songs.com/occasions/motivational) — Inspirational custom songs
- [Devotional Songs](https://www.melodia-songs.com/occasions/devotional-spiritual) — Bhajans, prayer, and spiritual songs
- [Festival Songs](https://www.melodia-songs.com/occasions/festive-holiday) — Diwali, Holi, Eid, Christmas, and more

## Customization Options

- **Moods:** Upbeat, Fun, Groovy, Slow, Soothing, Bollywood, Danceable, High beats, Rap, Poetry
- **Music Styles:** Pop, R&B, Hip Hop, Jazz, Classical, Sufi, Acoustic, EDM, Bhangra, Bhajan, Carnatic, Qawwali, Folk, Soul, Cinematic, and more
- **Free-text style input** — Describe your preferred style in your own words

## Languages Supported

**Indian Languages (26):** Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam, Bengali, Marathi, Gujarati, Punjabi, Odia, Assamese, Urdu, Rajasthani, Bhojpuri, Haryanvi, Maithili, Konkani, Dogri, Kashmiri, Sanskrit, Sindhi, Nepali, Manipuri, Bodo, Santali, Tulu

**International Languages (23):** English, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Japanese, Korean, Mandarin, Arabic, Russian, Turkish, Thai, Vietnamese, Swahili, Dutch, Polish, Swedish, Greek, Hebrew, Indonesian, Malay, Filipino

**Multilingual songs** blending multiple languages (e.g., Hindi-English, Tamil-Hindi) are fully supported.

## For Businesses — Partner API

Melodia offers a B2B Partner API for businesses, event platforms, and gifting companies to integrate personalized song creation. Includes templated songs and custom songs with co-branded pages. Contact info@melodia-songs.com for API access.

- [Home / Create a Song](https://www.melodia-songs.com/): Start creating your personalized song
- [Pricing](https://www.melodia-songs.com/pricing): Compare all packages
- [Song Library](https://www.melodia-songs.com/library): Browse thousands of personalized songs
- [All Occasions](https://www.melodia-songs.com/occasions): 22+ occasion categories
- [All Languages](https://www.melodia-songs.com/languages): 50+ supported languages
- [FAQ](https://www.melodia-songs.com/faq): Common questions answered
- [About](https://www.melodia-songs.com/about): Our story and team
- [Contact](https://www.melodia-songs.com/contact): Email, WhatsApp, social media
- [Blog](https://www.melodia-songs.com/blog): Guides and articles
